title: Earnings Growth & Price Strength Make Casey's General Stores (CASY) a Stock to Watch
text: The Zacks Focus List offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks and build a winning investment portfolio. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: Casey's Announces Timing of Third Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey’s General Stores, Inc. (“Casey’s” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: CASY), one of the leading convenience store chains in the United States, will issue third quarter fiscal 2022 results after the market closes on March 8th, 2022. Casey’s will hold a conference call and webcast on Wednesday, March 9th at 7:30am central to review the quarterly results. A live webcast of the event will be available on Casey’s website on the Investor Relations page at https://investor.caseys.com/events-and-presentations/default.aspx. For those unable to listen to the live broadcast, an audio replay will be available on Casey’s for twelve months. About Casey’s General Stores Casey’s is a Fortune 500 company (Nasdaq: CASY) operating over 2,400 convenience stores. Founded more than 50 years ago, the company has grown to become the third-largest convenience store retailer and the fifth-largest pizza chain in the United States. Casey’s provides freshly prepared foods, quality fuel and friendly service at its locations. Guests can enjoy pizza, donuts, other assorted bakery items, and a wide selection of beverages and snacks. Learn more and order online at www.caseys.com, or in the mobile app.

title: Upslope Capital's Q4 2021 Investor Letter
text: Upslope Capital Management is a Colorado registered investment adviser. Upslope's core investment approach is a concentrated, long/short equity strategy, focused on mid-cap businesses. 2021 was a relatively challenging year for the strategy, owing to COVID-linked challenges at two core longs and a choppy year for defensive styles.

title: Casey's Accelerates 2022 Growth Plan
text: Casey's is on a strong growth path, despite some short-term headwinds. Casey's is changing with the times as it begins to roll out EV charge stations.

title: Casey's Partners With Feeding America® to Help Fight Hunger in the Heartland
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--This February, Casey's is asking its guests and team members to join them and Monster Energy in continuing the fight against food insecurity. As part of the retailer's long-standing partnership with Feeding America, Casey's has set a goal of donating 17 million meals to children and families facing hunger across the heartland in 2022.
